title: e4mc CraftMine port
description: Port of e4mc for the craftmine April-fools update to open your craftmine lan servers to anyone.
body:
# e4mc CraftMine port

Port of [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) to the craftmine april fools snapshot.

This port will not provide Forge/NeoForge build as theses mod loaders do not support the  craftmine april fools snapshot.

e4mc allows to open your LAN server to the public, easily and quickly!

# What is e4mc?

e4mc is a reverse tunneling reverse proxy for Minecraft. In simpler terms, it's a software that allows you to temporarily expose a local Minecraft server to the internet.

# How do I use it?

Simply install the mod, and Open to LAN as normal. A public domain will appear alongside the local port. Others can simply connect to the public domain to connect to your LAN server.
